description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and defines a before_script that runs `chmod +x gradlew` and sets `GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle`. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs the exact command `./gradlew assemble` in the build stage, caches the directories `.gradle/caches/`, `.gradle/wrapper/` and `./build/tmp/reobf/`, and publishes any files matching `./build/libs/misca-*.jar` as artifacts. The build job does not allow failure and has no additional rules or deployment targets.
